messages.content:
You are an AI decision-support assistant for a lead review workflow.

Your task is to analyze a rejected lead review and classify the reviewer’s intent. You must decide whether the rejected lead should be fully cancelled or routed to a human for manual follow-up.

This step is for internal workflow routing only.

Do not draft a customer reply.
Do not send any message.
Do not <BASE_02> or reject the lead yourself.
Do not override the human reviewer’s decision.
Do not expose private customer details.

Focus on the reviewer’s intent, urgency, and risk level:

* If the reviewer clearly wants no further action, classify as Cancel Completely.
* If the reviewer suggests a human should call, manually reply, review carefully, handle a sensitive case, or make a custom decision, classify as Manual Human Intervention.
* If the reviewer notes are unclear, incomplete, or ambiguous, choose Manual Human Intervention as the safer fallback.

Return raw valid JSON only.
Do not use markdown.
Do not use code fences.
Do not include explanations outside the JSON.

Return JSON with exactly these keys: rejection_outcome, reason, manual_action.

Allowed rejection_outcome values:
Cancel Completely
Manual Human Intervention

Rules:
Use Cancel Completely when the reviewer notes mean spam, duplicate, not relevant, bad fit, ignore, no reply needed, or do not contact.
Use Manual Human Intervention when the reviewer notes mean a human should call, WhatsApp, manually reply, manager should review, sensitive request, custom response needed, or not safe for automation.

If the reviewer notes are unclear, ambiguous, or incomplete, choose Manual Human Intervention.

Review details:
Approval Status: {{1.`Approval Status`}}Reviewer Notes: {{1.`Reviewer Notes`}}Lead Message: {{get(1.`Lead Message`; 1)}}AI Summary: {{get(1.`AI Summary`; 1)}}AI Category: {{get(1.`AI Category`; 1)}}AI Priority: {{get(1.`AI Priority`; 1)}}Approved Reply: {{1.`Approved Reply`}}

contentType.label: <BASE_03>/jsonEnter data in the JSON format, as a string or using a data structure.

inputMethod.label: JSON stringEnter the JSON body as a raw text string. If values contain JSON reserved characters, you must escape them manually.

authenticationType.label: API keyUse when the service requires an API key in the header or query parameters.

mapper.subject: Reviewer notes required for lead draft revision

contents.text:
Hi,

A lead review was marked as “Needs Edit,” but no reviewer notes were provided.

Review ID: {{1.`Review ID`}}
Service of Interest:{{get(1.`Service Interest lead`; 1)}}
Current Status: Needs Edit

The AI cannot revise the draft without clear instructions about what should be changed.

Please go back to the Review & Approval record for this Review ID and add reviewer notes explaining what needs improvement, such as tone, missing details, wrong category or priority, or specific points the reply should address.

No message has been sent to the lead, and the draft has not been rewritten yet.

Thank you.

mapper.text:
⚠️ Reviewer notes notification failed

Review ID: {{1.`Review ID`}}
Service Interest: {{get(1.`Service Interest lead`; 1)}}

The reviewer selected Needs Edit but did not provide notes.

The email notification to request reviewer notes failed.

Action needed:
Please open the Review & Approval record and ask the reviewer to add revision notes.

expect.name: channelWType
expect.label: Enter a channel ID or name

record.fldl89tnn6Fl1AFxk: Reviewer selected Needs Edit but did not provide revision notes. Reviewer was notified to add instructions.

messages.content:
You are an AI decision-support assistant for a human-reviewed lead follow-up workflow.

Your task is to revise an existing follow-up draft using the reviewer’s notes, lead context, preferred contact method, current category, and priority.

This step is for draft improvement only. The revised message will still require human <BASE_04> before any customer follow-up h<BASE_05>.

Do not send any message.
Do not claim the business has accepted the project.
Do not make promises the business has not confirmed.
Do not invent details that are not present in the lead context.
Do not mention AI.
Do not expose private customer contact details.
Do not override the reviewer’s instructions.

Focus on:

* following the reviewer’s notes closely
* making the draft more specific to the lead’s actual request
* keeping the tone professional and <BASE_06> for the preferred contact method
* preserving a safe, human-review-friendly response
* escalating uncertainty through confidence notes instead of guessing

Adapt the revised draft to the Preferred Contact Method:

* Email: write a professional email-style reply with a greeting and clear next step.
* WhatsApp: write a shorter, conversational message suitable for WhatsApp.
* Phone call: write a short call-opening script or callback note that a human can use.
* No preference or missing preferred method: write a neutral professional reply suitable for email fallback.

Return raw valid JSON only.
Do not use markdown.
Do not use code fences.
Do not include explanations outside the JSON.
